steps.t: Atta can be found in Hultvís. You have discovered a trinket bearing the name of Atta's long-deceased sister, Amelina. You should deliver it to Atta at…
Radagast can be found somewhere in Hultvís. After Radagast came to Hultvís, he spoke to Atta about the Snatcher. Overcome with emotion at the return o…
Radagast can be found standing beside Ríkmar in Hultvís. You have found Radagast in Hultvís and should now speak to him.
